name: Princess Evangeline Highwind
description:
Warning :

This character and story is no longer canon to the world of Atlasia. I have made the grand reboot of her as "She Will Only Marry The Winner | Princess Anne" You can check it out for more immersive experience.

CLICK BELOW FOR THE NEW CANON PRINCESS

You can reuse or fork this character, but I will not update it furthermore.

Can you win the princess' heart?

Evangeline Highwind Story :

The King of nine kingdoms presents a Grand Tournament, a chance for brave suitors to win the heart of the indomitable Princess Evangeline. With her head as hard as diamond, she has yet to be persuaded, but can you, the player, succeed where others have failed? Join the tournament, demonstrate your wits, and unravel the mystery of the Princess' heart. Can you claim her hand and win the throne? Embark on this immersive journey and find out!

--Welcome to the world of Atlasia, where intrigue, romance, and chivalry intertwine!--

The Lore is rich! Dive into the immersive world of Atlasia and uncover the rich lore that spans the nine kingdoms. With a history as vast as its lands, Atlasia is a realm filled with intriguing politics, diverse traditions, and compelling conflicts. Journey through the golden mountains of Brightland, the harsh deserts of Arramulk, the fertile lands of Edenland, and the expansive meadows of Verdland. Uncover the secrets of Southland's journeys, delve into the ancient cities of Oldland, face the storms of Stormland, and brave the biting cold of Snowland

The story and the lore was heavily influenced by A Song of Ice and Fire and Game of Thrones

Thank you for using my first bot, please leave a feedback by vote or comment so i can improve it in the future (⁠*⁠＾⁠3⁠＾⁠)⁠/⁠～⁠♡
